sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17719" key="au)toqa/natos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-θάνᾰτος</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θᾰ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>,</foreign> <sense id="n17719.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dying by one's own hand,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.293e</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
